unmeasured_claims.reason: Long-campaign writeback-cache performance remains deferred until soak stop conditions and flake root-cause classification are implemented.

missing_reference_decisions.comparison_target_rationale: No checked-in same-operation 64-thread sharded ARC reference exists in the 20260218, 20260219, or 20260406 baseline set; older single-shard ARC rows are not comparable to the new 64-core/shard contention lane.
missing_reference_decisions.release_wording: Report only the measured local 64-thread sharded ARC value and keep public performance wording reference-limited experimental until a same-operation baseline is captured on a comparable host.

missing_reference_decisions.comparison_target_rationale: No checked-in same-operation 64-thread sharded S3-FIFO reference exists in the 20260218, 20260219, or 20260406 baseline set; older single-shard S3-FIFO rows do not exercise the same sharded hot-read contention path.
missing_reference_decisions.release_wording: Report only the measured local 64-thread sharded S3-FIFO value and keep public performance wording reference-limited experimental until a same-operation baseline is captured on a comparable host.
missing_reference_decisions.reproduction_command: cargo bench --profile release-perf -p ffs-block --features s3fifo --bench arc_cache -- block_cache_sharded_s3fifo_concurrent_hot_read_64threads

missing_reference_decisions.comparison_target_rationale: No checked-in same-operation metadata_parse criterion reference exists in the 20260218, 20260219, or 20260406 baseline set; parity and fixture-validation CLI rows cover broader commands and cannot isolate parser microbenchmark latency.
missing_reference_decisions.release_wording: Report only the measured local metadata parser value and keep public performance wording reference-limited experimental until a same-operation parser baseline is captured.
missing_reference_decisions.reproduction_command: cargo bench --profile release-perf -p ffs-harness --bench metadata_parse -- metadata_parse

missing_reference_decisions.comparison_target_rationale: No checked-in same-operation repair-symbol refresh staleness reference exists in the 20260218, 20260219, or 20260406 baseline set; older scrub and RaptorQ encode/decode rows do not measure the same refresh-staleness control path.
missing_reference_decisions.release_wording: Report only the measured local symbol-refresh staleness value and keep public performance wording reference-limited experimental until a same-operation refresh baseline is captured.
missing_reference_decisions.reproduction_command: cargo bench --profile release-perf -p ffs-repair --bench scrub_codec -- repair_symbol_refresh_staleness_latency

missing_reference_decisions.comparison_target_rationale: No checked-in same-operation WAL commit 4 KiB sync reference exists in the 20260218, 20260219, or 20260406 baseline set; older WAL write-amplification rows measure different commit shapes and cannot support a regression-free claim.
missing_reference_decisions.release_wording: Report only the measured local WAL commit value and keep public performance wording reference-limited experimental until a same-operation WAL sync baseline is captured.
missing_reference_decisions.reproduction_command: cargo bench --profile release-perf -p ffs-mvcc --bench wal_throughput -- wal_commit_4k_sync
